en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Personal Income Tax (IRPEF) Form F24 in the Italy IRPEF Applicability Assessment questionnaire.

The Consolidated Text of Income Tax Laws (TUIR) requires companies to act as tax withholding agents to withhold Personal Income Tax (IRPEF) on payments to individuals and to certify those withholdings through the Form F24.\n\n
Please upload your company's Personal Income Tax (IRPEF) Form F24.
